chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1202 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 4695/24 3.For hearing of main case 08-04-2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Nisar Ahmed Memon, Advocate for respondents No.2 to 5. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional P.G. **** In compliance of order dated 25.03.2025, counsel for respondents No.2 to 5 files statement along with certain documents, taken on record. He submits that M.D, Sindh Small Industries Corporation, Karachi could not appear before this Court as he is seriously ill. He further submits that grievance of the petitioner would be redressed in accordance with law within a period of one month. After such statement, counsel for petitioner is satisfied and wants disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with listed application(s) with directions that grievance of the petitioner be redressed strictly in accordance with law and no violation of law be made. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
